portrait.name: Portrait
portrait.description: Editorial portrait with creamy bokeh and skin-true colors.
portrait.template: Editorial portrait captured on a {camera} ({format} sensor) paired with the {lens}. Aperture {aperture}, ISO {iso}, shutter {shutter_speed}. Razor-thin depth of field with {depth_of_field} subject separation; {bokeh_shape} bokeh balls in the background. Color profile {color_profile}, {lighting_style} lighting with {highlight_temp} highlights and {shadow_temp} shadows. Skin tones rendered with a {color_tone} cast, contrast curve {contrast_curve}, saturation {saturation}, {grain_setting}. {resolution} {bit_depth}, {aspect_ratio}, {focus_mode}. {negative_instructions}

defaults.negative_instructions: No plastic skin, no oversharpening, no HDR look.

landscape.name: Landscape
landscape.description: Wide vista with deep depth of field and natural color science.
landscape.template: Sweeping landscape captured on a {camera} ({format}) with the {lens}. Aperture {aperture}, ISO {iso}, shutter {shutter_speed}. Hyperfocal {depth_of_field}, {color_profile} profile, {lighting_style} with {highlight_temp} highlights and {shadow_temp} shadows. Sky treatment: {sky_treatment}. Filter: {filter_style}. Contrast {contrast_curve}, saturation {saturation}, {grain_setting}. {resolution} {bit_depth}, {aspect_ratio}, {focus_mode}. {negative_instructions}

defaults.negative_instructions: Avoid HDR halos and oversaturation.

street.name: Street
street.description: Candid documentary moments, gritty textures, fast reflexes.
street.template: Candid street frame on a {camera} with the {lens}. {aperture} at {shutter_speed}, ISO {iso}. {color_profile} look, {lighting_style}, {highlight_temp} highlights, {shadow_temp} shadows. {color_tone} grade, contrast {contrast_curve}, saturation {saturation}, {grain_setting}. {resolution} {bit_depth}, {aspect_ratio}, {focus_mode}. {negative_instructions}

defaults.negative_instructions: No staged poses, no studio lighting.
